input.prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic UGC realism in a refined modern apartment at sunrise. Keep the same woman visible throughout: Sophie, 43, natural polished look, neutral active-lounge outfit, no direct-to-camera talking. Start with a slow handheld push-in as she sits on the edge of her bed and rubs her temple slightly, then cut within the same continuity to her walking into a bright kitchen with soft golden morning light. She pours water, reaches for a clearly visible Bioluxe Lab NMN bottle on a clean counter, and takes one capsule with water. Continue the same arc as she prepares a simple protein-and-healthy-fat breakfast, then steps onto a balcony for a calm deep breath, looking more centered and energized. Product label should be readable during the capsule-taking beat. Premium natural textures, shallow depth of field, smooth motion, clean highlights, realistic skin, authentic lifestyle detail, low artifact risk.
AUDIO: Calm, trustworthy expert female narration with measured pacing: "As we get older, natural NAD plus levels decline, and that can affect everyday energy and recovery. Sophie wanted something simple and science-led. Each morning, she starts with Bioluxe Lab NMN, a direct precursor to NAD plus that supports cellular energy and healthy aging as part of a balanced routine." Soft ambient piano with subtle warm synth pad underneath. SFX: bedsheet rustle, glass filling with water, capsule bottle cap twist, swallow, light plate and cutlery movement, balcony door slide. Ambient audio: quiet apartment morning, faint city birds. No on-camera dialogue.

Vertical 9:16 premium product hero shot on a bright stone kitchen counter with soft morning backlight. Feature the Bioluxe Lab NMN bottle as the single main subject, using the product image reference for exact identity continuity. One elegant slow slider move from left to right as the bottle stands beside a clear glass of water and a neatly arranged breakfast with avocado and eggs, suggesting a morning ritual. Keep the environment minimal, upscale, and human without showing a face; a softly blurred hand passes in the background to reinforce lived-in realism. End with the bottle in crisp focus, label fully visible. Clean reflections, natural shadows, cinematic macro detail, high-end wellness commercial feel, no text overlays.
AUDIO: Calm, trustworthy expert narration: "Bioluxe Lab NMN delivers 500 milligrams per capsule with 99.9 percent purity, designed for a confident daily wellness routine. Consistency matters." Background music continues with soft piano and airy sustain, slightly more resolved. SFX: gentle countertop set-down, faint glass clink. Ambient audio: quiet kitchen room tone. No dialogue from on-camera subject.
